representative_examples.description: User asked for Li Zongsheng representative works; system returned generic music-object profile.
User asked Zhang Ailing fiction characteristics; system returned Luo Dayou / Mandopop themes and songs.
User asked whether the system had read Zhang Ailing; system leaked local cards/session/solver implementation language.
User asked relation among mono no aware, impermanence, and seasonality; system returned Chinese pop/internal domain text.
User asked why Hou Hsiao-hsien films are slow; system answered with Zhang Ailing or unrelated urban primitives.

operation_typing.reason: Regex-priority operation detection covered canary phrasing but missed common hidden operations such as creation process, listening scene, preference stance, symbolic motif, and concept relation.

active_referent_tracking.reason: Pronouns and follow-ups over-trusted stale active cards and did not enforce typed referent compatibility.

active_domain_tracking.reason: Stale session domain and broad lexical cues overrode explicit current nouns and domain shifts.

concept_binding.reason: Small concept set covered public canary seasonality but did not handle relation synthesis among nearby concepts.

last_answer_transform.reason: Rewrite and simplify copied previous content plans even when the previous answer was wrong or unsatisfied.

content_planning.reason: Non-prose schema existed, but facts/concepts were only reliable when target and primitive retrieval succeeded.

surface_realization.reason: Surface could produce concise output but could not detect wrong plan semantics; legacy generic profile language still appeared.

finalizer.reason: Finalizer used narrow literal checks and did not truly verify referent, domain, concept cluster, or operation satisfaction.

diagnostic_design.reason: Public diagnostics were self-authored, narrow, and too close to repaired canary patterns.

public_canary_repair_scope: Japanese literature characteristics to seasonality follow-up
small sibling set for Ozu, modern art, Darwin, and food analogy
before_another_hidden_review_required: frozen candidate unseen by next hidden prompts
state-contamination audit across mixed domain shifts
transform refusal when previous answer is invalid
explicit current noun/domain override over stale state

deterministic_patching_assessment.risk: Continuing deterministic patches for open-ended cultural dialogue is likely to increase template debt, regex conflicts, stale-state exceptions, and false-green diagnostics.

learned_surface_or_q_lora_research_requi: explicit training target for typed turn understanding and grounded surface realization
multi-turn preference pairs from real and blind mixed sessions
labels for operation, referent, domain, concept cluster, answer shape, and semantic preservation
negative examples for stale-state contamination and wrong-domain drift
train/dev/private-holdout split by scenario and entity/domain family
final_conclusion: B. deterministic path likely near saturation; learned surface/reasoning path should be researched
